text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's finally here! Free coffee refill day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if the owner of the cafe is doing well. I
hope it hasn't gone out of business for being such
a hidden sp—

text_block_list.name: Lovey-dovey Couple
text_block_list.text:
Awww, it says one-hour wait! But if I'm with you,
I'm sure it won't feel that long. ♪

text_block_list.name: Stylish Girls
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! It looks just like the magazine! Retro
cafes are super in right now!

She walks away from the cafe, feeling dejected at
the situation...
